title: Day 1 Forecast Discussion
discussion:
Strong to very strong thunderstorms are expected today for Poland on July 1st 2026, with the highest risk being MDRT.

A low pressures system above Poland brought extensive amounts of moisture into Poland, meaning storms will have plenty of "fuel".

MDRT
Poland
Strong to Very strong thunderstorms are expected in Poland. They will be accompanied with very large hail, very strong to severe damaging wind gusts, and also a slight tornado risk.
Models show strong LLS with very humid low levels. STP shows enhanced tornado threat.

There is also a great possibility that the thunderstorms combine into a large MCS system.
